project_info.name: Matar.AI
project_info.domain: AI, Automations, Immersive Tech B2B Consulting
project_info.archetype: Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast) + Dark Mode mixed with Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury)
project_info.vibe: Futuristic, clean, modern SaaS AI startup UI (Vercel/Linear aesthetic), premium, authoritative.

font_families.headings: Outfit or Cabinet Grotesk (Premium, geometric, striking)
font_families.body: Manrope or IBM Plex Sans (High legibility, technical but human)

hierarchy.notes: Never use Inter for headings. Use fluid typography with clamp or Tailwind breakpoints.

rules.gradients: Do not overload with gradients. Use solid dark backgrounds and apply gradients ONLY to specific text spans (e.g., bg-clip-text) or as subtle glowing borders.
rules.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA standards. Do not use pure black (#000000); use the tinted #050B1A base.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8, p-12, p-24) to establish a premium 'Jewel & Luxury' feel.
layout_and_spacing.marketing_grid: Use Mode A 'Tetris Grid' with high asymmetry for the marketing page. Avoid standard 3-column Bootstrap grids.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: Use Mode B 'Control Room Grid' for the Admin CMS.
layout_and_spacing.containers: Max width 7xl (max-w-7xl) for standard sections, edge-to-edge for hero backgrounds.

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Smooth, deliberate, and premium. No bouncy or chaotic animations.

patterns.hover: Subtle lift (-translate-y-1) and inner glow via box-shadow on cards.
patterns.scroll: Fade in and slight upward reveal (y: 20 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1) using staggered children for lists.
patterns.buttons: Relative positioning with an absolute inset gradient border that rotates or brightens on hover.

images.description: Matar.AI Logo - Place in Header and Footer.
Hero background. Must be positioned absolute, inset-0, with a bg-[#050B1A]/80 overlay so text remains readable.
Visual asset for the 'Esperienze 3D/AR/VR' service card.
Visual asset for the 'AI & Automazioni' service card.
Graphic for the 'Metodo / Process' section (analisi -> strategia -> sviluppo -> implementazione -> ottimizzazione).

landing_page.hero: H1 emphasizing ROI and high-ticket AI implementation. CTA: 'Prenota una Consulenza'. Large background asset with heavy overlay.
landing_page.per_chi_e: Target audience section acting as a filter. 'Sei un'azienda B2B...' vs 'Non facciamo per te se...'. Use strict, authoritative typography.
landing_page.services: Bento grid (Mode A) showcasing the 3 pillars: AI & Automazioni, Formazione AI, Esperienze 3D/AR/VR. Use the generated 3D assets.
landing_page.methodology: Step-by-step process timeline using a vertical layout or sticky scroll. Use monospace fonts for step numbers.
landing_page.case_studies: Grid of realistic examples showing metrics and ROI. Use 'Tracing Beam' border effect on hover.
landing_page.about: Brief, authoritative intro mentioning Matar.AI and EvolverAI. Focus on business value, not just technical skills.
landing_page.blog_preview: Grid showing top 3 latest insights with standard CMS card styling.

admin_dashboard.style: Strict Control Room Grid (Mode B). Dense, functional UI. Rely heavily on Shadcn/UI for tables, forms, and dialogs.
admin_dashboard.features: CRUD for blog articles, SEO meta fields, rich text editor integration.

instructions_to_main_agent: NEVER use Shadcn UI's Card or Section components for the marketing landing page; use raw HTML and Tailwind for complete creative control.
USE Shadcn UI extensively for the Admin CMS, Contact Forms, and functional pieces.
DO NOT use placeholder images. Rely entirely on the URLs provided in the media section.
Apply `data-testid` attributes to all CTAs, navigation links, and form elements.
Ensure the hero background has an appropriate overlay (`bg-[#050B1A]/80`) so the white text contrast passes accessibility checks.

The primary CTA button should be a solid Electric Blue (#3B82F6) with white text, and on hover, add a subtle Cyan (#06B6D4) drop shadow or glow. Avoid making the button itself a full 3-color gradient.
Implement a language toggle (IT/EN) in the navigation header. Content default is Italian.
